function.name: generate_random_number
function.description: Generate a random integer between min and max (inclusive).
function.long_description: Generates a random integer within the specified range, including both the minimum and maximum values.
example_user_queries: Generate a random number between 1 and 10.
Pick a random number from 100 to 999.
Give me a random integer between -5 and 5.
Generate a number with min 20 and max 30.
Return a random number between 1000 and 5000.
Choose a random value from the range 50 to 60.
I need a random number between 200 and 250.
Pick any number in the interval 0 to 3.
Return a random number where min_val is 90 and max_val is 120.
